content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 20, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 20, 2026, focused on enhancing cloud infrastructure stability. The team implemented a root-cause fix for database connection issues by transitioning managed agents to local in-container PGlite databases.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Cloud Infrastructure Optimization
*   Implemented a new architecture for managed agents to resolve "too many clients" incidents by moving away from a shared cloud Postgres pool.
*   Integrated local in-container PGlite databases for agent-state persistence and deployed lean chat plugins.
*   Relevant PR: [#8754](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8754)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
